title: Limee Pack
description: A texture pack focused on a stylized vanilla, but still giving a different touch to the appearance of the game with items, mobs and gui.
body:
A texture pack focused on a stylized vanilla, but still giving a different touch to the appearance of the game with items, mobs and gui.

The pack features variations of identifiable blocks, potions, books and spawn eggs, to facilitate players, it also features animated items, which give the game a little more life, in addition to varied mobs and renaming armor.
